data.text/markdown: Import relevant libraries
Load SoilVUE Data
Include data from the SI-111, which is technically measuring Temperature of the canopy top, but is T0cm for the timeframe being examined.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='iMQP-0' random-id='13759c5f-67dd-da77-abd9-1d50724f1839'><marimo-multiselect data-initial-value='["T00cm","T05cm"]' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Select columns to plot:</span></span>"' data-options='["T00cm","T05cm","T10cm","T20cm","T30cm","T40cm","T50cm","T60cm"]' data-full-width='false'></marimo-multiselect></marimo-ui-element>
